execution_breakdown.description: Pure Graph: Graph engine single-handedly resolves structural relationships and filters numerical properties on nodes
Small actor set from BFS -> SQL WHERE IN filters efficiently
Strict Hybrid: SQL filters IDs -> Neo4j resolves network relations & extracts actor names -> SQL injects movie details
